message:
feat(conformance): Add cross-crate integration and E2E tests

Implemented 24 integration tests verifying cross-crate interactions:

Lipgloss + Bubbletea (3 tests):
- Style application in views
- Border and padding composition
- Layout join functions

Bubbles + Bubbletea (5 tests):
- Viewport rendering and scrolling
- TextInput value handling
- Progress bar rendering
- Spinner component rendering

Glamour + Lipgloss (3 tests):
- Markdown rendering
- Style variants (Dark, Light, Ascii, Pink)
- Code block rendering

Harmonica + Bubbles (2 tests):
- Spring physics for animations
- FPS utility functions

Huh Forms (6 tests):
- Form creation with multiple field types
- Input, Select, Confirm, Note rendering
- Theming system

E2E Scenarios (5 tests):
- Markdown viewer (glamour + viewport)
- Styled progress bar with lipgloss container
- Loading indicator (spinner + text + styling)
- Styled forms with multiple groups
- Layout composition (header/body/footer)

All 24 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
